channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Wahab advances in California special election for Swalwell's 14th Congressional District seat, CBS News projects
item.description: Voters in the San Francisco Bay Area are deciding who will fill the remainder of former Rep. Eric Swalwell's congressional seat in a special primary election.

item.title: Dramatic rescue efforts after fiery small plane crash in Texas kills 1
item.description: A business jet with six on board crashed on a Laredo, Texas, highway and caught fire, killing one person and causing chaos as passersby frantically tried to help.

item.title: Plane crashes onto Texas highway
item.description: Part of the plane remained on Laredo's Loop 20 early on Wednesday.

item.title: LIVE: ABC News Live
item.description: 24/7 coverage of breaking news and live events
